name: Roasted Pesto Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds red potatoes, cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, combine the pesto and potato chunks.
3. Spread the mixture evenly on a baking sheet.
4. Bake for 45 minutes or until the potatoes are crispy and golden brown.
5. Serve hot.
Yield: 4 servings
